# Frontend UI Resources

Supporting material for the merged frontend workflow.

## Included Resources

- `examples/good-audit-example.md` - what a strong audit looks like
- `examples/bad-audit-example.md` - common failure mode when AI skips the audit
- `case-studies/october-2025-incident.md` - why audit-before-implementation matters
- `case-studies/success-story-post-skill.md` - what success looks like after using the workflow

## When To Use These Files

- Use the examples when shaping an audit report.
- Use the case studies when teaching the workflow or checking whether a proposal is drifting toward redundant UI.
